---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: cv_style_webpage_2.css
    theme: default
    format-links: false
    grid:
      body-width: 920px
#bibliography: Bibliography/My Library.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: required-packages
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(googlesheets4)
library(quarto)
library(renderthis)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-cv-data
#| echo: false
#| include: false
cv_data <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12-v_2G9hekg9jv-Om4kFGLmT733Bnb6p_NSW0jl6nYY/edit?gid=1958414084#gid=1958414084"

personal_info <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Personal_Info") 
education <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Education") 
employment <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Employment") 
projects <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Projects") 
skills <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Skills") 
certifications <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Certifications") 
professional_service <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Professional_Service") 
references <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "References") 
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-personal-info
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Extract personal information
name <- paste0(personal_info$First_Name_Short, " ", personal_info$Last_Name, ", ", personal_info$Degree)
professional_title <- personal_info$Professional_Title
email <- personal_info$Email
phone <- personal_info$Cell_Phone
website <- personal_info$Website
linkedin <- personal_info$LinkedIn
github <- personal_info$Github
professional_statement <- personal_info$Professional_Statement

cat("::: {.personal_info}\n\n")
cat("::: {.text-center}\n\n")
cat("# ", name, "\n\n")
cat("<div class=\"professional-title\">**", professional_title, "**</div>\n\n", sep = "")
if (!is.na(professional_statement)) {
  cat("::: {.professional-statement}\n", professional_statement, "\n:::\n\n", sep = "")
}
cat(":::\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-contact
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Full-width Contact band between header and the two-column layout
cat("::: {.contact_info}\n\n")
cat("## Contact\n\n")
cat("::: {.contact-items}\n")
cat("[", email, "]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[", website, "](", website, ")]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](", linkedin, ")]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](", github, ")]{.contact-item}\n",
    sep = "")
cat(":::\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-layout
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Start 2-column container
cat(":::: {.columns style=\"column-gap: 1%;\"}\n\n")

# Left column - Employment and Education (70%)
cat("::: {.column width=\"70%\"}\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-employment
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.employment}\n\n")
cat("## Employment\n\n")

walk(1:7, \(i) {
  emp <- employment |> slice(i)

  # Spacer between employers (reduced white space)
  if (i > 1) {
    cat("::: {.emp-sep}\n:::\n\n")
  }

  cat("**", emp$Employer, "**, ", emp$Position_Title, ": ",
      emp$Month_Start, " ", emp$Year_Start, " - ",
      ifelse(is.na(emp$Month_End), "Present", paste(emp$Month_End, emp$Year_End)),
      "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0;\"}\n")
  cat(":::: {.callout-note appearance=\"minimal\" style=\"padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; border-left-color: #723d42ff; border: 0.0px solid #723d42ff\"}\n")
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0\"}\n")

  # Add the position description
  if (!is.na(emp$Position_Description)) {
    cat("::: {style=\"font-size: 72%;\"}\n")
    cat("**Position:** ", emp$Position_Description, "\n", sep = "")
    cat(":::\n\n")
  }

  # Add the Accomplishments column (ignore Accomplishments_ columns)
  if (!is.na(emp$Accomplishments)) {
    cat("::: {style=\"font-size: 72%;\"}\n")
    cat("**Accomplishments:** ", emp$Accomplishments, "\n", sep = "")
    cat(":::\n\n")
  }
  
  cat(":::\n")
  cat("::::\n:::\n\n")
})

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-projects
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.project_experience}\n\n")
cat("## Project Experience\n\n")

# List each project type from the Projects sheet, separated by semicolons.
# Bold the project type name, leaving any "(location)" in normal weight.
project_types <- projects$Project_Type |>
  na.omit() |>
  unique()

project_types_fmt <- map_chr(project_types, \(pt) {
  m <- str_match(pt, "^(.*?)\\s*(\\(.*\\))\\s*$")
  if (!is.na(m[1, 1])) {
    paste0("**", str_trim(m[1, 2]), "** ", m[1, 3])
  } else {
    paste0("**", str_trim(pt), "**")
  }
})

cat(paste(project_types_fmt, collapse = "; "), "\n\n")

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-close-left-column
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat(":::\n\n")  # Close left column
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-right-column
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Right column - Skills, Professional Service (30%)
cat("::: {.column width=\"30%\"}\n\n")

# Skills
cat("::: {.skills}\n\n")
cat("## Technical Skills\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(skills), \(i) {
  skill <- skills |> slice(i)
  if (!is.na(skill$Description)) {
    cat("- **", skill$Skill, "**: ", skill$Description, "\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("- **", skill$Skill, "**\n", sep = "")
  }
})
cat(":::\n\n")

# Professional Service
cat("::: {.professional_service}\n\n")
cat("## Professional Service\n\n")

walk(1:nrow(professional_service), \(i) {
  ps <- professional_service |> slice(i)
  
  # Year_End is a list-column (mixed numbers and text), so pull out the scalar
  year_end <- ps$Year_End
  if (is.list(year_end)) year_end <- year_end[[1]]

  year_range <- if(length(year_end) == 0 || is.na(year_end)) {
    as.character(ps$Year_Start)
  } else {
    paste0(ps$Year_Start, " - ", year_end)
  }
  
  cat("**", ps$Professional_Service, "**, ", ps$Institution, ": ", year_range, "\n\n", sep = "")
})

cat(":::\n\n")

# Education
cat("::: {.education}\n\n")
cat("## Education\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(education), \(i) {
  edu <- education |> slice(i)
  cat("**", edu$Degree, "** - ", edu$Degree_specialization, ", ", edu$Institution, ", ", edu$Location, "\n\n", sep = "")
})
cat(":::\n\n")

cat(":::\n\n")   # Close right column
cat("::::\n\n")  # Close columns container
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-publications
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Publications come from Bibliography/cv_publications.bib, generated by
# sync_zotero.py directly from the local Zotero database: peer-reviewed journal
# articles, the book chapter, and technical/working-group reports authored by
# T. Sippel, newest first, with "Sippel" bolded. Run `python3 sync_zotero.py`
# to refresh before rendering.
bib_path <- "Bibliography/cv_publications.bib"

parse_publications <- function(bib_path, author_surname = "Sippel") {
  raw <- readLines(bib_path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  starts <- grep("^@", raw)
  ends <- c(starts[-1] - 1, length(raw))
  entries <- mapply(function(s, e) paste(raw[s:e], collapse = "\n"),
                    starts, ends, SIMPLIFY = TRUE)

  get_field <- function(entry, name) {
    m <- str_locate(entry, regex(paste0("\\n\\s*", name, "\\s*=\\s*"), ignore_case = TRUE))
    if (is.na(m[1, 1])) return(NA_character_)
    s <- sub("^\\s+", "", substr(entry, m[1, 2] + 1, nchar(entry)))
    first <- substr(s, 1, 1)
    if (first == "{") {
      depth <- 0L; out <- ""
      for (ch in strsplit(s, "")[[1]]) {
        if (ch == "{") depth <- depth + 1L else if (ch == "}") depth <- depth - 1L
        if (depth == 0L && ch == "}") break
        if (!(ch == "{" && depth == 1L)) out <- paste0(out, ch)
      }
      return(str_trim(out))
    }
    if (first == "\"") {
      j <- str_locate(substr(s, 2, nchar(s)), "\"")[1, 1]
      return(str_trim(substr(s, 2, j)))
    }
    str_trim(sub(",.*$", "", strsplit(s, "\n")[[1]][1]))
  }

  delatex <- function(x) {
    accents <- list(
      c("\\\\c\\s*\\{?c\\}?", "ç"), c("\\\\c\\s*\\{?C\\}?", "Ç"),
      c("\\\\'\\{?a\\}?", "á"), c("\\\\'\\{?e\\}?", "é"), c("\\\\'\\{?i\\}?", "í"),
      c("\\\\'\\{?o\\}?", "ó"), c("\\\\'\\{?u\\}?", "ú"), c("\\\\'\\{?n\\}?", "ń"),
      c("\\\\`\\{?a\\}?", "à"), c("\\\\`\\{?e\\}?", "è"),
      c("\\\\\"\\{?a\\}?", "ä"), c("\\\\\"\\{?o\\}?", "ö"), c("\\\\\"\\{?u\\}?", "ü"),
      c("\\\\~\\{?n\\}?", "ñ"), c("\\\\~\\{?a\\}?", "ã"),
      c("\\\\\\^\\{?o\\}?", "ô"), c("\\\\\\^\\{?e\\}?", "ê")
    )
    for (a in accents) x <- gsub(a[1], a[2], x)
    x
  }

  clean <- function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) return(x)
    x <- delatex(x)
    x <- gsub("[{}]", "", x)
    x <- gsub("\\\\&", "&", x)
    x <- gsub("--", "–", x)
    x <- str_squish(x)
    if (x %in% c("-", "–", "")) return(NA_character_)
    x
  }

  # Anonymous / institution-authored reports the user contributed to but is not
  # personally credited on. Matched either by their institutional author string,
  # or (for author-less reports) by a distinctive phrase in the title.
  anon_authors <- c("National Academies of Sciences", "Informal Offshore Wind Energy Group")
  anon_titles  <- c("National Assessment by the Nature Record")

  recs <- lapply(entries, function(e) {
    typ <- tolower(sub("^@(\\w+).*", "\\1", e))
    au <- get_field(e, "author")
    au_c <- clean(au)
    yr <- get_field(e, "year")
    # Require a complete year; drop undated items (Zotero placeholder "0000")
    if (is.na(yr) || !str_detect(yr, "^\\s*\\d{4}\\s*$") || as.integer(str_trim(yr)) == 0)
      return(NULL)

    title_c <- clean(get_field(e, "title"))
    anon_by_author <- !is.na(au_c) && any(str_detect(au_c, regex(anon_authors, ignore_case = TRUE)))
    anon_by_title  <- !is.na(title_c) && any(str_detect(title_c, regex(anon_titles, ignore_case = TRUE)))
    if (anon_by_author || anon_by_title) {
      pub <- clean(get_field(e, "publisher"))
      if (is.na(pub)) pub <- clean(get_field(e, "institution"))
      if (!is.na(au_c)) {
        disp <- au_c
        nas <- str_extract(au_c, regex("National Academies of Sciences.*?Medicine", ignore_case = TRUE))
        if (!is.na(nas)) disp <- nas
      } else {
        disp <- pub   # author-less report: credit the publishing organization
      }
      # Don't repeat the publisher when it is the same as the author credit
      pub_show <- if (!is.na(pub) && !identical(pub, disp)) pub else NA_character_
      return(list(year = as.integer(str_trim(yr)), institutional = TRUE, author = disp,
                  title = title_c, publisher = pub_show))
    }

    if (is.na(au) || !str_detect(tolower(au), tolower(author_surname))) return(NULL)
    if (!typ %in% c("article", "incollection", "techreport")) return(NULL)
    venue <- get_field(e, "journal")
    if (is.na(venue)) venue <- get_field(e, "booktitle")
    if (is.na(venue)) venue <- get_field(e, "institution")
    venue_c <- clean(venue)
    if (!is.na(venue_c) && str_detect(venue_c, regex("Fishing News|Magazine", ignore_case = TRUE)))
      return(NULL)
    list(year = as.integer(str_trim(yr)), institutional = FALSE, type = typ, author = clean(au),
         title = clean(get_field(e, "title")), venue = venue_c,
         volume = clean(get_field(e, "volume")), number = clean(get_field(e, "number")),
         pages = clean(get_field(e, "pages")))
  })
  recs <- Filter(Negate(is.null), recs)

  norm <- vapply(recs, function(r) substr(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", tolower(r$title)), 1, 55), "")
  recs <- recs[!duplicated(norm)]
  ord <- order(-vapply(recs, `[[`, integer(1), "year"),
               vapply(recs, `[[`, character(1), "title"))
  recs[ord]
}

# Reduce a single author to "Last, F." (handles "Last, First M." and "First Last")
to_last_initial <- function(name) {
  name <- str_trim(name)
  if (str_detect(name, ",")) {
    last <- str_trim(sub(",.*$", "", name))
    rest <- str_trim(sub("^[^,]*,", "", name))
  } else {
    toks <- str_split(name, "\\s+")[[1]]
    if (length(toks) == 1) return(name)
    last <- toks[length(toks)]
    rest <- toks[1]
  }
  init <- str_extract(rest, "[A-Za-z]")
  if (is.na(init)) return(last)
  paste0(last, ", ", init, ".")
}

# Names as "Last, F."; for >3 authors show the first two plus Sippel, others "…"
format_authors <- function(author, surname = "Sippel") {
  parts <- str_split(author, "\\s+and\\s+")[[1]]
  norm <- unname(vapply(str_trim(parts), to_last_initial, ""))
  is_me <- str_detect(norm, regex(paste0("^", surname), ignore_case = TRUE))
  disp <- ifelse(is_me, paste0("**", norm, "**"), norm)
  n <- length(norm)
  if (n <= 3) {
    if (n == 1) return(disp[1])
    if (n == 2) return(paste0(disp[1], " & ", disp[2]))
    return(paste0(disp[1], ", ", disp[2], " & ", disp[3]))
  }
  me_idx <- which(is_me)[1]
  if (!is.na(me_idx) && me_idx > 2) {
    paste0(disp[1], ", ", disp[2], ", … ", disp[me_idx])
  } else {
    paste0(disp[1], ", ", disp[2], ", …")
  }
}

format_entry <- function(r) {
  if (isTRUE(r$institutional)) {
    out <- paste0(r$author, " (", r$year, "). *", r$title, "*.")
    if (!is.na(r$publisher) && nzchar(r$publisher)) out <- paste0(out, " ", r$publisher, ".")
    return(out)
  }
  out <- paste0(format_authors(r$author), " (", r$year, "). ", r$title)
  if (!grepl("[.?!]$", out)) out <- paste0(out, ".")
  if (!is.na(r$venue) && nzchar(r$venue)) {
    out <- paste0(out, " *", r$venue, "*")
    if (!is.na(r$volume) && nzchar(r$volume)) out <- paste0(out, " ", r$volume)
    if (!is.na(r$pages) && nzchar(r$pages)) out <- paste0(out, ": ", r$pages)
    out <- paste0(out, ".")
  } else if (!is.na(r$number) && nzchar(r$number)) {
    out <- paste0(out, " ", r$number, ".")
  }
  out
}

pubs <- parse_publications(bib_path)

cat("::: {.publications}\n\n")
cat("## Publications\n\n")
for (r in pubs) cat(format_entry(r), "\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```
